非晶态装甲云: Handle Hero Death:  Custom revive structure is specified, but is not alive.  Aborting.
Amorphous Armorcloud: Handle Hero Death:  Custom revive structure is specified, but is not alive.  Aborting.

非晶态装甲云: 诺娃正在你的指挥中心等候调遣。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova is ready for action at your Command Center.

非晶态装甲云: <c val="FF9800">诺娃的静滞晶壳已被摧毁。你必须建造一个指挥中心才能使其返回战场。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <c val="FF9800">Nova's Stasis Shell has been destroyed. You must construct a Command Center to return her to the battlefield.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 打开任务特定作弊窗口
Amorphous Armorcloud: Open the Mission specific Cheat window

非晶态装甲云: 太阳能碎片不能在该地图中手动给予。请用该命令移除你的“给予玩家资源”调用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Solarite should not be manually given in the map. Please remove your "Give Player Resources" calls with this.

非晶态装甲云: <c val="9BFFBE">诺娃已折跃出战场以免遭到致命伤害。你必须建造一个指挥中心才能使其返回战场。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <c val="9BFFBE">Nova has been warped off the battlefield to avoid lethal damage. You must construct a Command Center for her to rejoin the fight.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 无法从场景中获得对话
Amorphous Armorcloud: Could not get conversation for scene

非晶态装甲云: 英雄索引已经越界。增加最大英雄计数。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Hero index out of bounds. Increase max hero count.

非晶态装甲云: 装备该科技将会使其从该单位身上卸除。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Equipping this tech will remove it from that unit.

非晶态装甲云: Allows you to directly select a mission and mark it as complete as normal. Previous missions are completed based on a fixed path. The fixed path goes left, right, center column in the mission tree.
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows you to directly select a mission and mark it as complete as normal. Previous missions are completed based on a fixed path. The fixed path goes left, right, center column in the mission tree.

非晶态装甲云: 诺娃战役不能用该作弊命令完成。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Nova campaign cannot be completed with this cheat.

非晶态装甲云: 随机选择部队分配和亚顿之矛技能。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Randomizes both Army units and Spear of Adun abilities.

非晶态装甲云: 为你的部队单位选择科技
Amorphous Armorcloud: Select technology for your army units

非晶态装甲云: 选择一件物品进行装备并了解详细介绍。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Select an item to equip it and learn more.

非晶态装甲云: 为你的下一关任务选择装备
Amorphous Armorcloud: Please select equipment for your next mission

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionMapFlavorTitle">帝国军基地</s><s val="NovaMissionMapFlavorSubtitle"></n>啸风山，伯利亚</n>海拔：2387米</s>
<s val="NovaMissionMapFlavorTitle">塔桑尼斯城</s><s val="NovaMissionMapFlavorSubtitle"></n>前联邦首都</n>废弃于2500年</s>
一年一度的驭浪™冲浪赛将在AJ沙滩隆重举行。这场赛事届时将由UNN进行电视转播，比较尴尬的是比赛时间正好与泰拉多尔的角鲸交配季撞期。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The annual Surf's Up™ competition famously takes place at A & J's Beach. Televised on the UNN, the event's timing overlaps awkwardly with the Tyradorian narwhal's mating season.

非晶态装甲云: 人类保卫者部队正驻守着体育场东面的这一处要地，保护幸存者免遭异虫的袭击。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man forces are holding this point east of the stadium to prevent the zerg from reaching the survivors.

非晶态装甲云: 这座岛上地势最高的这块要地可以作为阻击异虫的中途站。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The highest point on the island will serve as a staging point for intercepting the zerg.

非晶态装甲云: 诺娃和少量女妖战机将向这里发起一次战术打击，直至敌方增援抵达。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova and a small number of banshee ships will initiate a tactical strike here until enemy reinforcements arrive.

非晶态装甲云: 渔人营地会在最热的旅游旺季期间，举办钓鱼和潜水有奖比赛。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Fisherman's Barracks hosts award-winning fishing and snorkeling trips during the high tourist season.

非晶态装甲云: 海洋天堂酒店拥有泰拉多尔九号星最大的无边泳池，不过据说附近的帝国度假区也即将开始动工建设。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Ocean's Paradise Hotel is noted for having the largest infinity pool on Tyrador IX, although the nearby Imperial Resort and Suites is rumored to begin construction soon.

非晶态装甲云: 贝壳岛是短途旅客们最喜爱的一处旅游景点，因其有非常美丽的贝壳而闻名。退潮时，整座岛与大陆之间只有浅水之隔，游客们甚至可以徒步涉水登岛。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Shell Isle is a popular destination for day trippers. Noted for its beautiful seashells, it is separated from the mainland by water so shallow during low tide that tourists can walk to the island.

非晶态装甲云: 原本只对旧联邦大家族开放的日落棕榈酒店与游艇船坞，现在对所有人开放。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Originally exclusive to the Old Families of the Confederacy, the Sunset Palms Hotel and Marina now provides a convenient dock for everyone.

非晶态装甲云: 这座体育场原本是北滩角鲸颠球队的主场，如今却有上万游客与平民工人正在场内等待营救。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Thousands of tourists and civilian workers are waiting for evacuation in the stadium, which is normally home to the North Shore Narwhals padball team.

非晶态装甲云: 异虫在西面登陆，并且在埃瑟卡罗海岸商店街与落日健步区建立了虫巢。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The zerg made landfall in the west and have established hives in the Elsecaro Coast Shoppes and the Sunset Hiking Trail.

非晶态装甲云: 星罗棋布的洞穴遍布这颗星球的地表之下。得益于这一天然的安全环境，伽尔班鲸鸟就经常栖息于其中。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A series of caves extends just beneath the planet's surface. The Jarban Gliders are known to inhabit them due to their secure environment.

非晶态装甲云: 扫描显示此处位置有一股微弱的信号。这里可能就是最后一次与尤摩扬研究人员联络的地点。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Scans show a weak signal is emanating from this location. It could be the last known point of contact with the Umojan researchers.

非晶态装甲云: 该区域已清空，方便建立基地。此处有足够的晶体矿与高能瓦斯，并且还有两处适合防御的关口。
Amorphous Armorcloud: This area is cleared for easy construction and features adequate minerals and vespene gas, as well as two defensible chokepoints.

非晶态装甲云: 尤摩扬护国军曾派了一支科考队前来此地研究原生伽尔班鲸鸟。他们的设施利用生物作为一种采集地嗪的生物机械加工设备。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Umojan Protectorate sent a research colony here to study the native Jarban Gliders. Their devices use the creatures as a kind of biomechanical processing for the terrazine.

非晶态装甲云: 阿拉纳克的战士们集结此地准备与诺娃争夺地嗪控制权。他们的部队构成表明，他们的攻势将主要以空中打击为主。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Alarak's warriors have gathered here to compete against Nova for control of the terrazine. Their forces indicate that they're planning for an air-based offensive attack.

非晶态装甲云: 记录显示，这片区域是尤摩扬二级采矿任务的集散中心。他们似乎一直在开采异乎寻常的晶体矿脉。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Records list this area as the central hub for a secondary Umojan mining operation. They appear to have been harvesting unusual crystal formations.

非晶态装甲云: 尤摩扬在此处建立了一座科研站来协助他们的研究工作。从日志记录上来看，还有一些防御性机器人设备也被运到了这里。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Umojans established a science facility here to assist with their research. Some defensive robotic equipment was shipped here according to the logs.

非晶态装甲云: “艾因科恩”是一支刚刚被收购的颠球球队，原本安达萨体育场将要成为他们的主场场地，但是在他们刚刚抵达之后就遭到了异虫袭击。至今没有一人的尸体被辨认出来。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Andasar Stadium was scheduled to host the Einkorns--a recently purchased padball team--but the zerg attack struck just after their arrival. None of their bodies have been identified.

非晶态装甲云: 城市码头曾是安提加最繁忙的区域，每天有大量的军用与民用舰船在此往返。这些货箱会被转运到一个代号为“10号仓库”的中转站。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The city's docks were the busiest on Antiga, taking many military and commercial shipments. These crates were being moved to an intermediary location known affectionately as "Storeroom 10."

非晶态装甲云: 源自于诺娃的回忆。它们的重要性目前尚不可知。
Amorphous Armorcloud: From Nova's memories. Their significance is currently unknown.

非晶态装甲云: 虽然目前已被感染者占据，但这里却是调查这些坐标的理想基地。上方和右侧区域需要布置防御。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Currently occupied by infestors, but ideally situated for investigating the coordinates. Defenses needed on top and right sides.

非晶态装甲云: 在遇袭之前，整个新安达萨城都是由这条地铁连接的。如今部分路段已经被感染体阻碍。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Before the attack, the entire city of New Andasar was connected by this subway. Now parts of it have been blocked by the infestation.

非晶态装甲云: 如果将异虫清理干净，这里将会是一处非常理想的采矿点。
Amorphous Armorcloud: If the zerg hive were cleared out, this would be an excellent mining location.

非晶态装甲云: 尽管安提加主星是一个人口较少的边缘星球，但它仍然是帝国拥有超高人气的“美食饭店”连锁集团的一处重要分店所在地。只是当地的健康督查员对其不怎么感冒罢了。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Though a lower population fringe world, Antiga Prime was still a key outpost of the Dominion's beloved Tasty Foody restaurant chain. The local health inspectors remained much less enthusiastic, however.

非晶态装甲云: 将军的部队禁止平民经行此处。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The general's forces have prohibited civilians from entering the grounds beyond this point.

非晶态装甲云: 诺娃会从下水道潜入戴维斯的大本营，以躲避侦测。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova will enter Davis's compound through the sewers to avoid detection.

非晶态装甲云: 大本营配备有大型机库，可存放重型进攻性武器与飞行器。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The compound is equipped with a large hangar bay to store heavy assault weaponry and aircraft.

非晶态装甲云: 人类保卫者在这一区域建造有关押房，其配备的高级护盾可以束缚幽灵特工的能力。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man have constructed holding cells in this area, with advanced shielding capable of containing a ghost operative.

非晶态装甲云: 将军声称她将在其办公室内的一处绝佳安全位置收看皇帝的电视讲话。在此期间，办公室的门应该处于上锁状态。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The general has said that she will watch the speech from a secure vantage point in her office. It is expected to remain locked for that time.

非晶态装甲云: 皇帝将在这座阳台上发表他的讲话。下方庭院中已经聚满了人群，其中还有大量来自帝国各大主要媒体的新闻工作者。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The emperor will be delivering his speech from this balcony. A large crowd has amassed in the courtyard below, along with numerous reporters from all major Dominion media outlets.

非晶态装甲云: 瓦伦里安大帝的演讲台
高居帝国将军要职的戴维斯，在新式武器研发上获得了大量的资金支持。她的科学家们夜以继日地在这些地区进行着各种高级武器实验。
Amorphous Armorcloud: As a Dominion general, Davis received extensive funding for new weapons research. Her scientists have been conducting their tests in these areas.

非晶态装甲云: 这两处终端控制着戴维斯将军办公室的大门，并且受到人类保卫者人员的严密监视。
Amorphous Armorcloud: These two terminals control the security for the door to General Davis's office. They are closely monitored by Defenders of Man personnel.

非晶态装甲云: 一处破败不堪却人气依旧的城市地标，虽然“狂飙酒吧”的格调与环境已经不能和以前相比，但是它的顾客们却觉得如今这副形象和他们才搭。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A seedy but beloved city landmark, the Overdrive Bar claims that though the structure itself may have seen better days, its patrons sure haven't.

非晶态装甲云: 在看过不利于戴维斯将军的证据之后，人类保卫者的基层官兵们决定不再为其效力。他们会尽全力阻止塔达林的进攻。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Lower ranking members of the Defenders of Man have rescinded their support for General Davis after seeing the evidence against her. They will do their utmost to stop the Tal'darim from advancing.

非晶态装甲云: 霍纳上将已经控制了这些地点，并准备藉此抵御塔达林的进攻。他会随着战况的发展而提出增援要求。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Admiral Horner has secured these points and intends to hold them against the Tal'darim onslaught. He will need reinforcements as the fight continues.

非晶态装甲云: 诺娃的部队必须守住此处。如果人类保卫者和帝国军的防御崩溃，这里将是抵御塔达林的最后一道防线。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova's forces must hold this point as a final defense against the Tal'darim if the Defenders of Man and Dominion armies fall.

非晶态装甲云: 瓦多纳自然历史博物馆通常被认为是全帝国最顶级的博物馆，因其藏有一副保存完好的雷兽骨架而广为人知，人们还特意给这副骨架取了一个绰号叫“弗里茨”。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Often called the best in the Dominion, the Vardona Natural History Museum is widely known for its well-preserved ultralisk skeleton, affectionately nicknamed Fritz.

非晶态装甲云: 瓦多纳自然历史博物馆
帝国科学界一直在密切关注瓦多纳研究中心的工作进展，据传这里是开发高级力场的所在地。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Dominion science community has been closely tracking the work here at the Vardona Research Center, which is rumored to involve highly advanced force fields.

非晶态装甲云: 诺娃可以将她的基地扩张到这些位置点，从而在整个战斗过程中都能获得足够的资源供应。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova may expand her base into these locations to acquire additional resources over the course of the battle.

非晶态装甲云: 这套地铁系统连接着城市的不同区域，可提供快捷的运输服务。
Amorphous Armorcloud: This subway connects different locations in the city, providing easy transport.

非晶态装甲云: 塔达林的入侵部队当前位于此处，但是可能会从不同的方向发起攻击。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Tal'darim invasion forces are currently located here, but may strike from different directions

非晶态装甲云: 诺娃和她的部队将在造船厂的最南端建立起他们的基地。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova and her forces will establish their base in the southernmost area of the shipyard.

非晶态装甲云: 戈尔贡级战列巡航舰在驶离造船厂之前都会在这里加注燃料。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Gorgon-class battlecruisers are refueled here before leaving the shipyards.

非晶态装甲云: 这些进坞的舰船在修理期间无法攻击。诺娃必须保护它们免受戴维斯攻击的破坏。
Amorphous Armorcloud: These dry docked ships cannot attack while they are being repaired. Nova must defend them from General Davis's attacks.

非晶态装甲云: 作为一道标准程序，戈尔贡级战列巡航舰在修复期间必须卸除其武器系统。在维护结束之前，它们的J23型飞弹都会被妥善地存放在平台上。
Amorphous Armorcloud: It is standard procedure to disarm Gorgons during repairs. Their J23 missiles are carefully stored on the platform until maintenance has concluded.

非晶态装甲云: 人类保卫者已经加强了这一区域的军事存在，企图阻止诺娃及其盟友接近赞托斯的维修地点。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man have fortified their presence in this area to prevent Nova and her allies from getting closer to the Xanthos's repair location

非晶态装甲云: 一支不知疲倦的修理机器人中队维护着瑟罗斯造船厂的基建设施。无论是在平台边缘还是在主干道两边，随时都能看到它们忙碌的身影。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A diligent squadron of repair bots maintains the infrastructure of the Cerros Shipyards. They can usually be sighted working around the platform's edges, out of the way of general traffic.

非晶态装甲云: 这台无可匹敌的战争机器可以装备火焰喷射器、磁轨炮、战机库，以及飞弹武器库。额外的战斗模式仍然处于机密状态。
Amorphous Armorcloud: This unparalleled war machine can be equipped with a flamethrower, rail gun, aircraft bay, and missile arsenal. Additional combat modes remain classified.

非晶态装甲云: 对目标区域内的敌方地面和空中单位造成最多<d ref="Effect,NovaGadgetPulseGrenadesDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。不会对友方单位造成伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Deals up to <d ref="Effect,NovaGadgetPulseGrenadesDamage,Amount"/> damage to enemy ground and air units in the target area. Does not damage friendly units.

非晶态装甲云: 脉冲手雷利用浓缩爆发能量在小范围内产生威力巨大的爆炸，对在密闭空间内行动的幽灵特工来说是个非常有效的反人员武器。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Pulse grenades utilize a concentrated energy burst to create a powerful explosion within a small radius, making them an effective anti-personnel option for ghosts who are operating in enclosed environments.

非晶态装甲云: 击晕目标区域内的敌方地面和空中单位，使其侦测能力失效，持续<d ref="Behavior,FlashBangGrenade,Duration"/>秒。巨型单位以及友方单位免疫。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Stuns and disables the detection of enemy ground and air units in the target area for <d ref="Behavior,FlashBangGrenade,Duration"/> seconds. Massive units and friendly units are immune.

非晶态装甲云: 闪光雷的技术十分古老，甚至比泰伦联邦的历史还要久远，然而它们在现代武器库中一直占据着一席之地。这种武器能使大范围内的敌方作战人员头晕目眩。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The technology for flashbang grenades is far older than the Confederacy, yet they continue to warrant a place in modern arsenals. Their detonation disorients hostile combatants in a large radius.

非晶态装甲云: 使攻击和移动速度提高<d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.AttackSpeedMultiplier *100-100"/>%，持续<d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/>秒。在效果持续时间内持续治疗诺娃<d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]*Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/>点生命。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases attack speed and movement speeds by <d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.AttackSpeedMultiplier *100-100"/>% for <d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/> seconds. Heals Nova for <d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]*Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/> life over the effect's duration.

非晶态装甲云: 给高灵能指数的对象（例如幽灵特工）注入强化剂一直以来被认为风险很高。然而全新的改进型强化剂配方解决了绝大多数的顾虑。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Administering stimulants to high PI subjects such as ghosts has historically been considered extremely dangerous. New and improved stim formulation, however has alleviated most of those concerns.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">强化剂注射</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">持续治疗诺娃，并在短暂时间内提高她的攻击和移动速度。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Stim Infusion</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Heals Nova over time and temporarily increases her attack and movement speeds.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 部署一个可以被控制的诺娃全息复制体。全息体造成诺娃50%的伤害，受到的伤害额外提高50%。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Deploys a holographic duplicate of Nova that can be controlled. The hologram deals 25% of Nova's damage and takes 25% less damage.

非晶态装甲云: 从原型通信技术的基础上重制而来的全息诱饵，虽然可以在外形上做到以假乱真，不过它们并不是固体物质。尽管作用有限，但它们仍然具备不错的援护能力。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Repurposed from prototype communications technology, holographic decoys are convincing in appearance but are far from being solid matter. Though they cannot comprise an entire army, they function quite well as reinforcements.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">全息诱饵</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">部署一个可以被控制的诺娃全息复制体。全息体造成诺娃50%的伤害，受到的伤害额外提高50%。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Holo Decoy</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Deploys a holographic duplicate of Nova that can be controlled. The hologram deals 25% of Nova's damage and takes 25% less damage.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 在不知疲倦的刻苦钻研下，帝国科学家们成功复制出了艾贡·斯台特曼的离子力场原型机，并且进行了更加合理的人机化重新设计。不再需要结合机械体才能使用了。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Thanks to tireless research and development, Dominion scientists have replicated Egon Stetmann's prototype ionic force field and have redesigned it for more humane deployment and operation. Integration with a cybernetic body is no longer required.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">离子力场</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">给诺娃提供一道护盾，持续<d time="10"/>，每次受到攻击吸收<d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,DamageResponse.ClampMaximum"/>点伤害，最多吸收<d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Shields]"/>点伤害。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Ionic Force Field</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Provides Nova with a shield that lasts <d time="10"/> and absorbs <d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,DamageResponse.ClampMaximum"/> damage from each incoming attack, up to a maximum of <d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Shields]"/> damage.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 以诺娃为中心，显示<d ref="Behavior,NovaHelmetGhostVisorDetector,Modification.Radar"/>范围内敌方单位的位置。可以侦测隐形和潜地单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Reveals the locations of enemy units within a radius of <d ref="Behavior,NovaHelmetGhostVisorDetector,Modification.Radar"/> from Nova's position. Can detect cloaked and burrowed units.

非晶态装甲云: 幽灵面罩可以将重要的任务情报呈现给战场上的幽灵特工。每一个面罩还配备了个人扫描系统，使其佩戴者随时都能获知战场最新情况。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Ghost Visors present mission critical intel to ghosts in the field. Each visor is also outfitted with a personal scanner system to keep its wearer apprised of battlefield conditions at all times.

非晶态装甲云: 这副测距护目镜搭载了精密的光学仪器和三角测量仪，是狙击手们最青睐的装备，能让他们从非常远的距离发现并狙击敌人。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Specialized optics and onboard triangulation make rangefinder goggles the ideal piece of gear for snipers, allowing for spotting and engagement at distances that would be otherwise impossible.

非晶态装甲云: 使诺娃的视野及其非近战类武器的射程提高2。诺娃的近战类武器的射程提高1。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases Nova's vision and the range of her non-melee weapons by +2. Increases the range of Nova's melee weapons by +1.

非晶态装甲云: 这副测距透镜搭载了精密的光学仪器和三角测量仪，是狙击手们最青睐的装备，能让他们从非常远的距离发现并狙击敌人。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Specialized optics and onboard triangulation make the Rangefinder Oculus the ideal piece of gear for snipers, enabling spotting and engagement at distances that would be otherwise impossible.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">测距透镜</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">扩大诺娃的视野及其非近战类武器的射程。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Rangefinder Oculus</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Increases the range of Nova's vision and non-melee weapons.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 允许诺娃控制目标敌方单位。同一时间只能控制一名敌方单位。效果持续直至取消。冷却时间会在效果取消后开始生效。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Nova to take control of target enemy unit. Only one enemy unit can be controlled at a time. Effect lasts until cancelled. Cooldown timer begins once the effect has been cancelled.

非晶态装甲云: 精神控制是幽灵军校招募新兵时最为看重的一项能力。脑控面罩就是经过校准的专门用于隔离这些天才，并且大幅增强他们脑波强度的装备。在执行缺乏内应的渗透行动时，具有不可替代的作用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Mind control is one of the most highly sought-after abilities among ghost academy recruits. Indoctrination Visors are calibrated to isolate such talents and amplify them exponentially. They are invaluable tools for infiltration operations that lack an inside contact.

非晶态装甲云: 可以开启永久隐形的轻量化护甲。+150生命值, +1护甲, +0.25移动速度。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Lightweight armor that enables permanent cloaking. Adds +150 life, +1 armor, and +0.25 movement speed.

非晶态装甲云: 专为幽灵特工在深入敌后执行极度危险任务时而使用的战术潜行服，能让使用者在不影响灵能能量的情况下永久隐形。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Reserved for ghosts on especially dangerous missions behind enemy lines, the Tactical Stealth Suit boasts optimizations that enable permanent cloaking without impacting its user's psionic energy.

非晶态装甲云: 让诺娃可以跨越悬崖地形的耐用型护甲。+250生命值, +2护甲, +0.5移动速度。穿戴时不能隐形。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Durable armor that allows Nova to jump up and down cliffs. Adds +250 life, +2 armor, and +0.5 movement speed. Cannot cloak while wearing.

非晶态装甲云: 原本是为民用建造工程而研发设计的涡轮喷射飞行服，其搭载的推进器和势能吸收护甲能让使用者在快速攀越峭壁的同时不会受到伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Originally developed for civilian construction projects, the Turbojet Jumpsuit's onboard thrusters and momentum absorption armor allow its user to rapidly scale sheer cliffs while also preventing injury.

非晶态装甲云: [PH] Through use of specialized nanomachines, the user is granted higher damage resistance and movement abilities. Deadmans nuke sold separately.
Amorphous Armorcloud: [PH] Through use of specialized nanomachines, the user is granted higher damage resistance and movement abilities. Deadmans nuke sold separately.

非晶态装甲云: 灵能扩增服。+200生命值, +1护甲, +0.25移动速度, +100能量。能量恢复速度提高50%。装备后可以隐形。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Psionic amplification suit. Adds +200 life, +1 armor, +0.25 movement speed, and +100 energy. Increases energy regeneration rate by 50%. Can cloak while wearing.

非晶态装甲云: 在微型阿波罗反应堆的基础上研制而来的阿波罗步兵服，将自身能量输出和储备转移给穿戴它的幽灵，从而不仅能延长潜行时间，还能强化灵能突击能力。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Designed around a miniaturized apollo reactor, the Apollo Infantry Suit adds its own energy output and storage to that of the ghost who wears it. This allows for tactics incorporating both prolonged stealth and intense psionic assault.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">阿波罗步兵服</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">提高诺娃的最大能量值及其能量恢复速度。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Apollo Infantry Suit</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Increases Nova's maximum energy and her energy regeneration rate.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 原型传送作战服。增加+200点生命，+1护甲，+0.25移动速度。允许诺娃传送至附近一处目标位置。传送后可以隐形<d ref="Behavior,NovaArmorBlinkSuitBlinkCloaked,Duration"/>秒。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Prototype teleportation suit. Adds +200 life, +1 armor, and +0.25 movement speed. Allows Nova to teleport to a nearby targeted location. Nova is cloaked for <d ref="Behavior,NovaArmorBlinkSuitBlinkCloaked,Duration"/> seconds after teleporting.

非晶态装甲云: 帝国科学家们改进了战术跳跃技术，将其实现成了类似于星灵追猎者的传送能力。激活该设备还会莫名地产生一道临时的隐形场，尽管这一功能有点出人意料，但所有人都认为这是一个美好的意外。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Dominion scientists have modified tactical jump technology to approximate the protoss stalker's teleportation capabilities. Activating the device also appears to generate a temporary cloaking field--an unintended but most welcome development.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">相位反应堆战服</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">原型护甲。允许诺娃传送至附近一处目标位置。诺娃在传送后会进入短暂的隐形状态。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Phase Reactor Suit</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Prototype armor that allows Nova to teleport to a nearby targeted location. Nova is briefly cloaked after teleporting.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 狙击步枪。可以远距离使用狙杀对目标造成<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponCanisterRifleSnipe,Amount"/>点伤害。可以对地和对空。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Sniper rifle. Can use Snipe to deal <d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponCanisterRifleSnipe,Amount"/> damage to a target enemy unit at long range. Can attack ground and air units.

非晶态装甲云: C-20A是一款多用途武器，具备强大的远程狙击能力，也可以用于中程火力对抗。它改良了C-10标准型步枪的缺点，提高了多个方面的性能。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The C-20A is a versatile firearm that combines powerful long-range sniper capabilities with ease of use in mid-range engagements. It improves upon the standard issue C-10 across all areas of performance.

非晶态装甲云: 短程霰弹枪。对前方弧形区域内造成伤害。可以使用穿透爆弹对弧形区域内的敌人造成<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount"/> (<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount + Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,AttributeBonus[Light]"/> 对轻甲)点伤害。可以对地。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Close range shotgun. Deals damage in a frontal arc. Can use Penetrating Blast to deal <d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount"/> (<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount + Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,AttributeBonus[Light]"/> vs Light) damage to enemies in the arc. Can attack ground units.

非晶态装甲云: 专为阻断步兵而设计的地狱火霰弹枪，先在内部引爆微型炸药，然后将爆炸冲击力传导到加固的枪口，对前方弧形区域喷射出毁灭性烈焰。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Designed for maximum infantry disruption, the Hellfire Shotgun detonates miniature explosives internally and then channels the blast through its reinforced muzzle to create a devastating arc of fire.

非晶态装甲云: 近战武器。无视敌方护甲和护盾。可以使用突杀疾冲一小段距离，对沿途敌人造成<d ref="Effect,NovaPsiStrikeDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。可以对地。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Melee weapon. Ignores enemy armor. Can use Dash Attack to dash forward a short distance and deal <d ref="Effect,NovaPsiStrikeDamage,Amount"/> damage to enemy units in Nova's path. Can attack ground units.

非晶态装甲云: 实验性单分子光刀可利用佩戴者的灵能能量将刀锋变得薄如分子、锋利无比，使其既能劈开物理护甲也能划破能量护盾。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The experimental Monomolecular Blade utilizes its wielder's psionic energy to hone an edge that has been sharpened to a microscopic degree, allowing it to cut through both physical armor and energy shields.

非晶态装甲云: 高功率能量武器。将敌人融化成一团超高温度的等离子体，并对周围的敌人造成伤害。可以使用等离子射击对单位造成伤害，产生额外的等离子体。
Amorphous Armorcloud: High output energy weapon. Melts targets into superheated plasma that damages nearby enemy units. Can use Plasma Shot to damage enemies and create additional plasma.

非晶态装甲云: 通常被作为重型火炮部署的等离子武器，具有携带方便和火力强大的特点。由于存在多种安全性因素，强烈建议只有受过适当训练的一线特工装备这种实验性武器。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Usually deployed as heavy artillery, plasma weaponry boasts significant firepower when condensed into a portable form. Due to several safety concerns, it is highly advised that only properly trained field agents equip this experimental ordnance.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">等离子步枪</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">高功率能量武器。将敌人融化成一团超高温度的等离子体，并对周围的敌人造成伤害。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Plasma Rifle</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">High output energy weapon. Melts enemies into pools of superheated plasma that damage nearby enemy units.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 多用途远近兼用型武器。攻击造成范围伤害。可以使用怒剑击，对一个大范围区域内的多名敌人造成多次攻击。可以对空和对地。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Versatile melee and ranged weapon. Attacks deal area damage. Can use Fury of One to execute multiple attacks against enemies in a large target area. Can attack ground and air units.

非晶态装甲云: 被认为是严重不合常规的闪焰枪刃，代表了枪械师队伍中的一个流派。他们主张完美的武器必须要能适用于任何类型的战斗。基于枪剑两用而设计的这把武器，只有具备极高武术造诣的人才能做到物尽其用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Considered wildly unconventional, the Blazefire Gunblade represents a school of thought amongst artisan gunsmiths that the perfect weapon can function well in all engagements. Designed as both a gun and a blade, it can only be wielded by the most accomplished martial artists.

非晶态装甲云: 给收割者装备D-8型炸药，提高他们在攻击建筑时的伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Reapers with D8 Charges, increasing the damage they deal when attacking structures.

非晶态装甲云: 给恶蝠和恶火装备地狱火预燃器，提高他们对轻甲单位造成的伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Hellbats and Hellions with Infernal Pre-Igniters, increasing the damage they deal to light units.

非晶态装甲云: 使用ATX激光炮组替换战列巡航舰的制式武器，可以同时瞄准并攻击多个目标。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Replaces the Battlecruiser's standard weaponry with ATX Laser Batteries, which can target and attack multiple enemy units at once.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">特制军品</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">升级单位的武器，使其获得额外功能。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Special Ordnance</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Upgrades the equipped unit's weaponry with additional functionality.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 允许女妖可以在没有附属科技实验室的星港中进行建造。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Banshees to be built at a Starport without an attached Tech Lab.

非晶态装甲云: 允许铁鸦可以在没有附属科技实验室的星港中进行建造。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Ravens to be built at a Starport without an attached Tech Lab.

非晶态装甲云: 允许战列巡航舰可以在没有附属科技实验室的星港中进行建造。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Battlecruisers to be built at a Starport without an attached Tech Lab.

非晶态装甲云: 恶蝠可以在恶蝠模式下将他们自己朝敌方地面单位发射过去。接触敌人时会将敌人短暂击晕。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Hellbats to launch themselves toward nearby enemy ground units while in Hellbat mode. Enemies are briefly stunned on impact.

非晶态装甲云: 使攻城坦克在任何模式下都可以自行调整位置抵达目标区域。可以用来跨越悬崖地形。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Siege Tanks to reposition themselves to a target location while in either mode. Can be used to jump up and down cliffs.

非晶态装甲云: 允许歌利亚武装机器人跨越悬崖地形。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Goliaths to jump up and down cliffs.

非晶态装甲云: 使收割者的视野提高2，武器射程提高1。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the Reaper's vision by 2 and its weapon range by 1.

非晶态装甲云: 使陆战队员的视野提高2，武器射程提高1。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the Marine's vision by 2 and its weapon range by 1.

非晶态装甲云: 使歌利亚武装机器人的对空武器射程提高3，对地武器射程提高1。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the Goliath's anti-air weapon range by 3 and its ground weapon range by 1.

非晶态装甲云: 使劫掠者的视野提高2，武器射程提高1。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the Marauder's vision by 2 and its weapon range by 1.

非晶态装甲云: 给陆战队员装备一件额外武器，每<d ref="Abil,MagrailMunitionsMarine,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/>秒对他们的目标造成<d ref="Effect,MagrailMunitionsDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Marines with an additional weapon that deals <d ref="Effect,MagrailMunitionsDamage,Amount"/> damage to their target every <d ref="Abil,MagrailMunitionsMarine,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/> seconds.

非晶态装甲云: 给劫掠者装备一件额外武器，每<d ref="Abil,MagrailMunitionsMarauder,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/>秒对他们的目标造成<d ref="Effect,MagrailMunitionsDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Marauders with an additional weapon that deals 50 damage to their target every <d ref="Abil,MagrailMunitionsMarauder,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/> seconds.

非晶态装甲云: 使用磁轨炮塔替换自动机炮，对一条直线上的敌方地面单位造成伤害。磁轨炮塔不能对空。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Replaces the Auto Turret with a Railgun Turret that deals damage to all enemy ground units along a straight line. Railgun Turrets cannot attack air units.

非晶态装甲云: 给歌利亚武装机器人装备额外的武器，每秒对其目标造成<d ref="Effect,MagrailMunitionsDamage,Amount"/>点伤害<d ref="Abil,MagrailMunitionsGoliath,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/>。该技能只能对空中单位使用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Goliaths with an additional weapon that deals <d ref="Effect,MagrailMunitionsDamage,Amount"/> damage to their target every <d ref="Abil,MagrailMunitionsGoliath,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/> seconds. This ability can target air units only.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">磁轨武器</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">给单位装备额外一项武器，对单位的目标周期性造成伤害。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Magrail Munitions</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Equips the unit with an additional weapon that periodically deals damage to the unit's target.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 允许恶蝠在恶火模式状态下实现行进射击。恶蝠在不同模式之间的转换速度提高四倍。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Hellbats to attack while moving in Hellion mode. Hellbats transform between modes four times faster.

非晶态装甲云: 允许解放者在不同模式之间的转换速度提高四倍。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Liberators to transform between modes four times faster.

非晶态装甲云: 使攻城坦克在不同模式之间的转换速度提高四倍。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Siege Tanks to transform between modes four times faster.

非晶态装甲云: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">智能伺服器</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">提高装备该科技的单位的变形速度。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Smart Servos</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Increases the speed of the equipped unit's transformation sequence.</s>

非晶态装甲云: 脱离战斗后以每秒恢复<d ref="Behavior,RegenerativeBioSteelSiegeTank,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]"/>点生命值的速度自动修复攻城坦克。

非晶态装甲云: <s val="VoidLoadingIntroScreenBody">这是一个充满极大变数的时代。黑暗之神——埃蒙已在一颗未知的星球上重生。他的到来昭示着整个星区所有生灵的末日。<n/><n/>在回艾尔面对族人的审判前，泽拉图在星系中四处奔波，孤注一掷地想要找到阻止黑暗降临的办法。他寻找着一个被遗忘已久的星球，据说那里藏有古老预言的最后一段残片，从中蕴含了最后一线希望。</s>
Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="VoidLoadingIntroScreenBody">It is an era of great uncertainty. The dark god, Amon, has been reborn on an unknown world. His arrival heralds doom for all life in the sector.<n/><n/>Before returning his people to face their judgment, Zeratul scours the galaxy. Desperate to find a way to stop the coming darkness, he seeks a long forgotten world that is said to hold the last fragments of an ancient prophecy that could provide a ray of hope.</s>

Ignores armor.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can only target biological units.</c>

If the host dies while still infected, it will explode, dealing <d ref="Effect,CorrosiveParasiteDamage,Amount"/> damage to units in the area.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Creates a bomb at the target location which explodes after <d time="3"/>, dealing <d ref="Effect,CorruptionBombDamage,Amount"/> + <d ref="Effect,CorruptionBombDamage,AttributeBonus[Armored]"/> Armored damage to enemies within <d ref="Effect,CorruptionBombSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius"/> radius.<n/><n/>Channeled ability.<n/><n/><c val="FFFF00">Does not deal damage to friendly units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 使目标单位无法移动，并在<d time="4"/>内造成总计<d ref="(Behavior,FungalGrowth,Duration / Behavior,FungalGrowth,Period) * Effect,FungalGrowthDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。被霉菌滋生击中的隐形单位或潜地单位会暂时现形。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Immobilizes target units and causes <d ref="(Behavior,FungalGrowth,Duration / Behavior,FungalGrowth,Period) * Effect,FungalGrowthDamage,Amount"/> damage over <d time="4"/>. Reveals cloaked and burrowed units.

非晶态装甲云: 将赫克拽向目标地面单位所在位置。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">无法攻击近距离的单位或空中单位。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Pulls the HERC to the target ground unit's location.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Cannot target units at close range or air units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 前线步兵。可以使用抓钩。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以对地。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Front-line infantry. Can use Grapple.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 治疗一个友方生物单位。<n/><n/><c val="f078ff">每消耗1点能量可治疗<d ref="Effect,MedivacHeal,RechargeVitalRate[0]"/>点生命值。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Heals a friendly biological target.<n/><n/><c val="f078ff">Heals <d ref="Effect,MedivacHeal,RechargeVitalRate[0]"/> life per 1 energy.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 发射一枚在<d time="5"/>后激活的猎杀飞弹并追击目标单位，在接触时将造成<d ref="Effect,SeekerMissileDamage,Amount"/>点范围伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Deploys a Seeker Missile which activates after <d time="5"/> and pursues the target unit, dealing <d ref="Effect,SeekerMissileDamage,Amount"/> splash damage upon contact.

非晶态装甲云: 远程攻击单位。可以变异为潜伏者。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">可以对地和对空。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Ranged attacker. Can morph into a Lurker. <n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Can attack ground and air units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: <d time="6"/>后折跃至目标位置。战列巡航舰在折跃时处于无敌状态。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">不需要视野。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: After <d time="6"/>, warps to the target location. Battlecruiser is invulnerable while warping.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Does not require vision.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 最多可吸收<d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/>点伤害，持续<d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,Duration"/>秒。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Absorbs up to <d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/> damage. Lasts for <d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,Duration"/> seconds.

非晶态装甲云: 在一个很小的范围内造成<d ref="Effect,HydraliskImpaleDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Deals <d ref="Effect,HydraliskImpaleDamage,Amount"/> damage in a very small area.

非晶态装甲云: 折跃进能量场的单位的折跃速度提高到<d time="5"/>。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the speed of warp in for units warped into the power field to <d time="5"/>.

非晶态装甲云: 善于感染的虫类，可以在潜地后移动。能够释放被感染的人类，并可以使用霉菌滋生和神经寄生技能。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Infestation specialist. Can move while burrowed. Can use the Infested Terran, Fungal Growth, and Neural Parasite abilities.

非晶态装甲云: 能够自动攻击航母目标的战斗飞行机。拦截机是航母唯一的武器。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以对地和对空。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Combat drones that automatically strafe their Carrier's target. Carriers may not attack without Interceptors.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack ground and air units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 可在短时间内引爆，造成10点伤害并击退附近的单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Explodes after a short delay, doing 10 damage and knocking back nearby units.

非晶态装甲云: 发射4名防御单位巡逻目标区域。激活时，航母不能使用拦截机。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Launches 4 defenders to patrol the targeted area. While active, the Carrier may not use interceptors.

非晶态装甲云: 重型火炮战机。装载有能对敌方空中单位造成范围伤害的飞弹。可以切换为防卫模式以提供攻城火力。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以对空。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Artillery fighter. Loaded with missiles that deal area damage to enemy air targets. Can switch into Defender Mode to provide siege support.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack air units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 变回战机模式。在这个模式下解放者可以自由移动，但只能攻击空中目标。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Reverts to Fighter Mode. In this mode Liberators can move, but they can only attack air targets.

非晶态装甲云: 无法移动的防卫战机。对地面单位造成大量单体伤害。可以切换为战机模式提供对空支援。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以对地。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Immobile defender. Deals heavy single target damage to ground units. Can switch into Fighter mode to provide air support.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 部署为防卫模式。在此模式下解放者可对地面单位造成大量单体伤害。在此模式下解放者无法移动。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Deploys into Defender Mode. In this mode Liberators inflict single target damage to ground units. Liberators in this mode cannot move.

非晶态装甲云: 让先知能够侦测隐形、潜地以及幻像单位，持续<d time="60"/>。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows the Oracle to detect cloaked, burrowed, and hallucinated units for <d time="60"/>.

非晶态装甲云: 使飓风的武器锁定目标单位，在<d ref="Effect,LockOnCP,PeriodCount * Effect,LockOnCP,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/>秒内造成<d ref="Effect,LockOnCP,PeriodCount*Effect,CycloneWeaponDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。开火时可以移动。如果目标离开射程后则取消。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Locks the Cyclone's weapons on the target unit, dealing <d ref="Effect,LockOnCP,PeriodCount*Effect,CycloneWeaponDamage,Amount"/> damage over <d ref="Effect,LockOnCP,PeriodCount * Effect,LockOnCP,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/> seconds. Can move while firing. Cancels if target moves out of range.

非晶态装甲云: 取消当前的锁定，使你可以选择一个新的目标。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Cancels the current Lock On, and allows you to select a new target.

非晶态装甲云: 命令选中的单位自由射击。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Orders selected units to fire at will.

非晶态装甲云: 命令选中的单位无视射程中的敌人。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Orders selected units to ignore enemies that are within range.

非晶态装甲云: 茧中包裹的刺蛇正在变异为潜伏者。
Amorphous Armorcloud: This cocoon contains a Hydralisk that is morphing into a Lurker.

非晶态装甲云: 使医疗运输机的移动速度提高70%，持续<d time="8"/>。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the Medivac's movement speed by 70% for <d time="8"/>.

非晶态装甲云: 终极星灵战舰。能够使用光子超载、群体召回和时间扭曲技能。使附近的友方单位和建筑隐形。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">可以对地和对空。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Ultimate Protoss vessel. Can use Photon Overcharge, Mass Recall, and Time Warp abilities. Cloaks nearby friendly units and structures.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Can attack ground and air units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 移动的施法单位。可以使用光子超载、群体召回和时间扭曲技能。可以升级为母舰。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以对地。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Mobile flying caster. Can use Photon Overcharge, Mass Recall, and Time Warp abilities. Can upgrade into the Mothership.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 将母舰以及所有附近的该玩家的单位传送至目标星灵枢纽。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Teleports the Mothership and all nearby units owned by the player to the targeted Nexus.

非晶态装甲云: 变异成潜伏者巢穴，使刺蛇可以变异成潜伏者。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Morph into a Lurker Den, allowing Hydralisks to morph into Lurkers.

非晶态装甲云: 空中施法单位。可使用天启、静滞结界和脉冲光线技能。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Flying caster. Can use Revelation, Stasis Ward, and Pulsar Beam.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Places a cloaked Stasis Ward at the target location. Once activated by an enemy ground unit, the ward traps nearby enemies in stasis for <d ref="Behavior,OracleStasisTrapTarget,Duration"/> seconds. Trapped units cannot be attacked or affected by abilities.

非晶态装甲云: 使目标区域内的单位和建筑获得视野，持续<d ref="Behavior,OracleRevelation,Duration"/>秒。显示隐形或潜地的单位和建筑。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Causes enemy units and structures within the target area to grant vision for <d ref="Behavior,OracleRevelation,Duration"/> seconds. Reveals cloaked or burrowed units and structures.

非晶态装甲云: 地面单位陷阱。隐形使敌人在不进行探测的情况下无法发现静滞结界。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Ground unit trap. Cloak renders the Stasis Ward invisible to enemies without detection.

非晶态装甲云: 提升移动速度，持续<d time="3"/>。每<d time="1" precision="1"/>对附近的<c val="FFFF00">任意</c>单位造成30点伤害。当超载后，施法者处于无敌状态，无法被瞄准，且可以穿过所有单位。伤害场持续<d time="6"/>。<n/><n/><c val="FFFF00">对所有单位造成伤害，包括友方单位。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases movement speed for <d time="3"/> and dealing 30 damage per <d time="1" precision="1"/> to <c val="FFFF00">any </c>nearby units. While Overcharged, the caster is invulnerable, untargetable, and can pass through all units. Damage field lasts <d time="6"/>.<n/><n/><c val="FFFF00">Deals damage to all units, including friendly.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 提供补给。<n/>提高本方单位数量上限。

非晶态装甲云: 茧中包裹的王虫正在变异为一只眼虫。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Creates a parasitic cloud that deals 90 damage over <d time="10"/> to the target and enemy air units nearby. If the target dies, the cloud remains in the air where the enemy died until it expires.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Cannot target ground units or structures.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 发射一枚灌注了灵能的子弹，对沿途的敌人进行打击，造成<d ref="Effect,PenetratingShotDamage,Amount"/>(+<d ref="Effect,PenetratingShotDamage,AttributeBonus[Biological]"/>对生物)伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Fires a psi-charged bullet that strikes enemies along its path, dealing <d ref="Effect,PenetratingShotDamage,Amount"/> (+<d ref="Effect,PenetratingShotDamage,AttributeBonus[Biological]"/> to bio) damage.

非晶态装甲云: 静滞结界处于永久隐形状态。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Stasis Ward is permanently cloaked.

非晶态装甲云: 保护目标区域内的友方单位免受伤害，持续<d time="5"/>。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Protects friendly units within target area from harmful effects for <d time="5"/>.

非晶态装甲云: 自动化防御激光，可以拦截敌军导弹。<n/><n/>对劫掠者、战狼、维京战机、女妖、战列巡航舰、飓风、雷神、导弹塔、追猎者、凤凰、风暴战舰、光子炮台、母舰核心、虫后、异龙、腐化者、刺蛇、破坏者、蝗虫和孢子爬虫有效。<n/><n/><c val="f078ff">每次攻击消耗10点能量值。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Automated defensive laser that intercepts enemy projectiles.<n/><n/>Effective against Marauders, Vikings, Banshees, Battlecruisers, Cyclones, Thors, Missile Turrets, Stalkers, Phoenixes, Tempests, Photon Cannons, Mothership Cores, Nexus, Queens, Mutalisks, Corruptors, Hydralisks, Ravagers, Locusts, and Spore Crawlers.<n/><n/><c val="f078ff">Each shot consumes 10 energy.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 获得<d ref="Behavior,PurificationNovaSpeedBoost,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus/Unit,Disruptor,Speed*100"/>%移动速度提升，<d ref="Behavior,PurificationNova,Duration"/>秒后放射出一道强大的新星，对附近的单位造成<d ref="Effect,PurificationNovaDamage,Amount"/>点溅射伤害。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">只会对地面单位和建筑造成伤害。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Gains <d ref="Behavior,PurificationNovaSpeedBoost,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus/Unit,Disruptor,Speed*100"/>% increased movement speed and then after <d ref="Behavior,PurificationNova,Duration"/> seconds emits a powerful nova dealing <d ref="Effect,PurificationNovaDamage,Amount"/> splash damage to nearby units.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Damages ground units and structures only.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 工作单位可从该矿脉采集资源。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Workers can harvest resources from this Mineral Field.

非晶态装甲云: 支援型空中单位。可以使用诱捕、孵化巢虫以及感染指挥中心。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Support flyer. Can use Ensnare, Spawn Broodlings, and Infest Command Center.

非晶态装甲云: 消灭目标生物单位，孵化出<d ref="Effect,QueenMPSpawnBroodlingsCreate,SpawnCount"/>只巢虫。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Kills target biological unit and spawns <d ref="Effect,QueenMPSpawnBroodlingsCreate,SpawnCount"/> Broodlings.

非晶态装甲云: 使医疗运输机卸载单位的速度加快一倍。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Medivac deploys loaded troops twice as fast.

非晶态装甲云: 朝目标位置发射一枚飞弹，撞击后对该范围内的所有单位造成<d ref="Effect,RavagerCorrosiveBileDamage,Amount"/>点伤害。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以摧毁星灵力场。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Launch a missile at the target location, dealing <d ref="Effect,RavagerCorrosiveBileDamage,Amount"/> damage to all units in the area upon impact.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can destroy Protoss Force Fields.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 使破坏者的腐蚀胆汁射程提高4。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the Ravager's Corrosive Bile range by 4.

非晶态装甲云: 空中支援单位。能够部署自动机炮、定点防御靶机和猎杀飞弹。<n/><n/><c val="FFE303">侦测单位</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Aerial support unit. Can use Auto-Turret, Point Defense Drone, and Seeker Missile.<n/><n/><c val="FFE303">Detector</c>

非晶态装甲云: 游骑兵。能够翻越悬崖。脱离战斗后能快速回复生命值。可使用KD8型炸弹。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以对地。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Raider. Can jump up and down cliffs. Regenerates life quickly while out of combat. Can use KD8 Charge.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 航母朝目标点发射所有拦截机，只有<d ref="Behavior,ReleaseInterceptorsTimedLife,Duration"/>秒的限时生命。拦截机会在范围内一直逗留直至其消失。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Carrier launches all Interceptors at the target point with a <d ref="Behavior,ReleaseInterceptorsTimedLife,Duration"/> second timed life. Interceptors remain at the area until they expire.

非晶态装甲云: 机械干扰型单位。可以使用净化新星造成大量伤害。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">可以对地。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Robotic disruption unit. Can use Purification Nova to deal heavy area damage.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 一个普通的纸板箱。从标签上来看，里面可能装着一条蛇。最好别碰它。
Amorphous Armorcloud: An ordinary cardboard box. According to its label, there might be a snake inside. Probably best to leave it alone.

非晶态装甲云: 每当<c val="ffff8a">使徒</c>消灭一名敌人时，其攻击便能弹跳至邻近的两名敌方单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows the <c val="ffff8a">Adept's</c> attack to bounce to two nearby enemy units whenever it kills an enemy.

非晶态装甲云: <c val="ffff8a">解放者</c>在防卫模式下的射程提高4。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the range of <c val="ffff8a">Liberators</c> in Defender Mode by 4.

非晶态装甲云: 激活后，使<c val="ffff8a">不朽者</c>最多可吸收<d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/>点伤害。持续<d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,Duration"/>秒。
Amorphous Armorcloud: When activated, allows <c val="ffff8a">Immortals</c> to absorb up to <d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/> damage. Lasts for <d ref="Behavior,ImmortalOverload,Duration"/> seconds.

非晶态装甲云: 使<c val="ffff8a">寡妇雷</c>潜地激活的速度提高3倍。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows <c val="ffff8a">Widow Mines</c> to burrow and activate three times as fast.

非晶态装甲云: 延长铁鸦的<c val="ffff8a">自动机炮</c>和<c val="ffff8a">定点防御靶机</c>的持续时间。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Extends the timed duration of Raven <c val="ffff8a">Auto-Turrets</c> and <c val="ffff8a">Point Defense Drones</c>.

非晶态装甲云: 强化<c val="ffff8a">恶火</c>的地狱火喷射器，使其对轻甲单位造成额外5点伤害。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">不影响地狱蝠。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Improves the <c val="ffff8a">Hellion's</c> Infernal Flamethrower to deal +5 damage vs. light units.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Does not affect Hellbat.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 提高<c val="ffff8a">医疗运输机</c>的燃料储备，使后燃推进系统的持续时间提高50%。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the <c val="ffff8a">Medivac's</c> fuel reserves, allowing Ignite Afterburners to last 50% longer.

非晶态装甲云: <c val="ffff8a">不朽者</c>死亡<d time="30"/>后自动复活。3分钟冷却时间。
Amorphous Armorcloud: <c val="ffff8a">Immortal</c> is automatically revived <d time="30"/> after death. 3 min cooldown.

非晶态装甲云: 使<c val="ffff8a">解放者</c>能变形为对地远程攻城单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Enables <c val="ffff8a">Liberators</c> to transform into a siege ranged anti-ground unit.

非晶态装甲云: 使<c val="ffff8a">飓风</c>的锁定射程从6提高至9。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases <c val="ffff8a">Cyclone</c> Lock On range from 6 to 9 and Locked On range from 12 to 15.

非晶态装甲云: 使<c val="ffff8a">蝗虫</c>的持续时间延长<d ref="Upgrade,LocustLifetimeIncrease,EffectArray[0].Value"/>秒。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the lifetime of <c val="ffff8a">Locusts</c> by <d ref="Upgrade,LocustLifetimeIncrease,EffectArray[0].Value"/> seconds.

非晶态装甲云: 使<c val="ffff8a">潜伏者</c>的攻击射程提高3。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the attack range of <c val="ffff8a">Lurkers</c> by +3.

非晶态装甲云: <c val="ffff8a">医疗运输机</c>的初始能量值提高<d ref="Upgrade,MedivacCaduceusReactor,EffectArray[0].Value"/>点。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the starting energy of <c val="ffff8a">Medivacs</c> by <d ref="Upgrade,MedivacCaduceusReactor,EffectArray[0].Value"/>.

非晶态装甲云: 使<c val="ffff8a">破坏者</c>的腐蚀胆汁射程提高4。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the <c val="ffff8a">Ravager's</c> Corrosive Bile range by 4.

非晶态装甲云: 使<c val="ffff8a">铁鸦</c>能够使用猎杀飞弹。猎杀飞弹需要<d ref="Behavior,SeekerMissileTimeout,Duration[0]"/>秒钟进行激活，如果激活完成时目标仍在导弹攻击范围内，则将受到<d ref="Effect,SeekerMissileDamage,Amount"/>点范围伤害。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Enables <c val="ffff8a">Ravens</c> to use the Seeker Missile armament. This missile activates after <d ref="Behavior,SeekerMissileTimeout,Duration[0]"/> seconds, dealing <d ref="Effect,SeekerMissileDamage,Amount"/> AoE damage to the target if they are still within range.

非晶态装甲云: 允许<c val="ffff8a">恶火</c>和<c val="ffff8a">恶蝠</c>在彼此之间任意变形。<c val="ffff8a">恶火</c>是快速的侦察单位，而<c val="ffff8a">恶蝠</c>则是近距离的作战单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows <c val="ffff8a">Hellions</c> and <c val="ffff8a">Hellbats</c> to transform between modes freely. In <c val="ffff8a">Hellion</c> mode they are fast scouts, but by activating <c val="ffff8a">Hellbat</c> mode they become close range combat units.

非晶态装甲云: 通过集中的不稳定中子光线攻击建筑。脉冲光线每<d ref="Effect,RipFieldCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/>秒造成<d ref="Effect,RipFieldDamage,Amount"/>点伤害值<n/><n/><c val="f078ff">每<d time="1" precision="1"/>消耗<d ref="-1 * (Behavior,PulsarBeam,Modification.VitalRegenArray[2] + Unit,Oracle,EnergyRegenRate)" precision="1"/>点能量值。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Attacks structures with a concentrated beam of unstable neutrons. The Pulsar Beam deals <d ref="Effect,RipFieldDamage,Amount"/> damage every <d ref="Effect,RipFieldCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/> second.<n/><n/><c val="f078ff">Drains <d ref="-1 * (Behavior,PulsarBeam,Modification.VitalRegenArray[2] + Unit,Oracle,EnergyRegenRate)" precision="1"/> energy per <d time="1" precision="1"/>.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 突击单位。潜地后能快速恢复生命值。可以变异为破坏者。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">可以对地。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Assault unit. Regenerates life quickly when burrowed. Can morph into a Ravager.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 为侦测器、折跃棱镜和巨像提供升级方案。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">开启：</c><n/>- 可以在机械台中折跃巨像<n/>- 可以在机械台中折跃干扰者
Amorphous Armorcloud: Contains upgrades for the Observer, Warp Prism, and Colossus.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Enables:</c><n/>- Colossi at the Robotics Facility<n/>- Disruptors at the Robotics Facility

非晶态装甲云: 每秒回复<d ref="Behavior,SelfRepair,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]"/>点生命值。雷神在被完全修复或者等待<d ref="Behavior,SelfRepair,Duration"/>秒后才能移动或攻击。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Regenerates <d ref="Behavior,SelfRepair,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]"/> life per second. Thor cannot move or attack until fully repaired or <d ref="Behavior,SelfRepair,Duration"/> seconds have passed.

非晶态装甲云: 从目标单位身上吸取能量。
释放拦截机攻击目标区域。拦截机会在该区域内持续存在，最多存在<d ref="Behavior,InterceptorTimedLife,Duration"/>秒或直至其被消灭。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Releases interceptors to attack the target area. Interceptors will remain in the area for up to <d ref="Behavior,InterceptorTimedLife,Duration"/> seconds or until killed.

非晶态装甲云: 向目标区域折跃异度时空，持续<d ref="Effect,TemporalFieldCreatePersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,TemporalFieldCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/>秒。进入力场的敌方地面单位移动速度降低<d ref="(1-Behavior,TemporalField,Modification.MoveSpeedMultiplier)*100"/>%。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Warps spacetime within the target area for <d ref="Effect,TemporalFieldCreatePersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,TemporalFieldCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/> seconds. Enemy ground units that enter the field have their movement speed reduced by <d ref="(1-Behavior,TemporalField,Modification.MoveSpeedMultiplier)*100"/>%.

非晶态装甲云: 为目标建筑时空提速，使目标建筑的运作效率提高<d ref="(((Behavior,TimeWarpProduction,Modification.TimeScale)-1)*100)"/>%。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Places target structure in a Chrono Boost, causing it to operate <d ref="(((Behavior,TimeWarpProduction,Modification.TimeScale)-1)*100)"/>% faster.

非晶态装甲云: 为狂热者、追猎者以及使徒提供升级方案。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Contains upgrades for Zealots, Stalkers, and Adepts.

非晶态装甲云: 飞行的施法者，战地的控场大师。可使用寄生弹、吞噬、蔽目毒云和绑架技能。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Flying caster. Able to manipulate battlefield conditions. Can use Parasitic Bomb, Consume, Blinding Cloud, and Abduct abilities.

非晶态装甲云: 缠绕目标建筑，造成<d ref="-1 * (Effect,ViperConsumeStructureModifyTarget,VitalArray[0].Change * Effect,ViperConsumeStructureCreatePersistent,PeriodCount)"/>点伤害并每秒为飞蛇恢复<d ref="(Effect,ViperConsumeStructureModifyCaster,VitalArray[2].Change / Behavior,TimeScaleConversionBehavior,Duration)" precision="1"/>点能量值。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">无法以盟友或敌方建筑为目标。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Latches onto the target structure, dealing <d ref="-1 * (Effect,ViperConsumeStructureModifyTarget,VitalArray[0].Change * Effect,ViperConsumeStructureCreatePersistent,PeriodCount)"/> damage and restoring <d ref="(Effect,ViperConsumeStructureModifyCaster,VitalArray[2].Change / Behavior,TimeScaleConversionBehavior,Duration)" precision="1"/> energy to the Viper every second.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Cannot target allied or enemy structures.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 远程特种单位。可以使用灵能传送。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">可以对地。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Ranged specialist. Can use Psionic Transfer.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 向靠近的敌方地面和空中单位发射导弹进行攻击。导弹对首要目标造成<d ref="Effect,WidowMineExplodeDirect,Amount"/>(+35对护盾)点伤害值，并对附近的其他单位造成<d ref="Effect,WidowMineExplodeSplash,Amount"/>(+<d ref="Effect,WidowMineExplodeSplashShields,VitalBonus[Shields]"/>对护盾)点溅射伤害。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">冷却时间：<d ref="Abil,WidowMineAttack,Cost[0].Cooldown[0].TimeUse[0]"/>秒。</c>
Amorphous Armorcloud: Attacks by launching missiles at enemy ground and air units that get too close. Missiles deal <d ref="Effect,WidowMineExplodeDirect,Amount"/> (+35 vs. shields) damage to their primary target, and <d ref="Effect,WidowMineExplodeSplash,Amount"/> (+<d ref="Effect,WidowMineExplodeSplashShields,VitalBonus[Shields]"/> vs. shields) splash damage to units nearby.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Cooldown: <d ref="Abil,WidowMineAttack,Cost[0].Cooldown[0].TimeUse[0]"/> seconds.</c>

  • 允许“奥古斯格勒的骄傲”连续快速发射三次大和炮。
Amorphous Armorcloud:

  • Grants Sky Furies a chance to evade enemy attacks in Fighter Mode. When Sky Furies take fatal damage in Assault Mode, they transform to Fighter Mode and gain a barrier.
  • Allows the Pride of Augustgrad's Yamato Cannon to fire three times in rapid succession.

These copies function like the original unit, but they cannot use active abilities, cannot deal damage, and die more easily. Hallucinations last <d ref="Behavior,HallucinationTimedLife,Duration"/> seconds before they disappear. Enemy detectors are able to distinguish between hallucinated Protoss units and real Protoss units.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Vile Strain<n/><n/>Assault unit. Regenerates life quickly while burrowed. Attacks debilitate the target, slowing its attack and movement speeds.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can attack ground units.</c>

非晶态装甲云: 早期建立分基地进行扩张是一种冒险的举动，但额外的资源收入有时值得您去这样做。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Expanding to a new resource location early in a game is risky, but the extra income is sometimes worth the risk.

非晶态装甲云: 武器和护甲升级会对现有及随后生产的单位产生影响，因此战斗持续越久，升级带来的受益便越多。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Weapon and armor upgrades affect existing and future units, so their benefits quickly add up over the course of longer games.

非晶态装甲云: 持续生产SCV、探机或工蜂是推动经济发展的关键。

非晶态装甲云: 利用编组功能，您在镜头不切换至基地的情况下便可以生产单位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can select all nearby units of a given type by double-clicking on a unit, or by holding CTRL and clicking on a unit.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Rich Mineral Fields are yellow, and can be harvested faster than normal Mineral Fields.

Amorphous Armorcloud: To win a multiplayer game, destroy all enemy structures or be the last player still in the game.

非晶态装甲云: 侦测单位能够识别幻像，铁鸦、侦测器或眼虫都属于侦测单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Detectors like Ravens, Observers, and Overseers can spot the difference between Protoss Hallucinations and real units.

非晶态装甲云: 按下<k val="CameraFollow"/>键可使镜头跟随选中的单位。

非晶态装甲云: SCV能够修理受损的建筑或机械单位。参与修理的SCV越多，则修理的进度便越快。
Amorphous Armorcloud: SCVs can be used to repair buildings or mechanical units. The more SCVs repairing, the faster the repair is complete.

非晶态装甲云: 在战斗中，使用一些SCV对关键性防御设施或作战单位进行修理以协助战斗。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Use several SCVs to keep vital defenses or combat units alive during a fight.

非晶态装甲云: 使用医疗运输机配合大型步兵作战团队的战斗。利用其运输能力将步兵单位运送至敌后，展开奇袭。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Use Medivacs to support large infantry groups. Use their transport abilities to take infantry behind enemy lines for surprise attacks.

非晶态装甲云: 恶火的火焰喷射器可对火力线覆盖的所有敌方单位造成伤害。靠近大批聚集的敌人后发动攻击，以使造成的伤害最大化。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Hellions do damage in a straight line with their flame thrower. Get close to packs of enemies to maximize your damage.

非晶态装甲云: 攻城模式下的攻城坦克无法攻击距离过近的单位。将攻城坦克部署在其它单位或建筑身后以拒敌于阵地之外。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Siege Tanks cannot fire at units that get too close. Put other units or structures in front of your Siege Tanks to keep the enemy back.

非晶态装甲云: 收割者能够翻越较矮的悬崖，适合执行侦察和奇袭敌人工作单位的任务。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Reapers can jump up and down short cliffs. Use them to scout the enemy or make surprise attacks against their workers.

非晶态装甲云: 在狭窄的通道中部署补给站可阻挡敌人的行进。在您要通过时可将补给站降下。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Place Supply Depots in narrow areas to block enemy access to your base. Lower them when you want to leave.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Use Stimpacks to make your infantry more dangerous in battle. Use Medivacs to heal the damage done by Stimpacks.

非晶态装甲云: 轨道控制基地调遣的矿骡能够加速资源的采集，应善加利用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Orbital Command Centers can call-down MULEs to gather additional resources. Use MULEs every chance you get.

非晶态装甲云: 建造更多的兵营、重工厂和星港可使您在同一时间生产更多的单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Building extra Barracks, Factories, and Starports enables you to train more troops at a time.

非晶态装甲云: 折跃开始后，星灵的建筑会自动完成这一过程，探机可前往进行其它工作。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Once started, Protoss structures construct themselves, freeing up the Probe to do other things.

非晶态装甲云: 星灵枢纽自身具备的时空提速技能可大幅提高探机的折跃速度。
Amorphous Armorcloud: You can rapidly train Probes by using the Nexus' Chrono Boost ability on the Nexus itself.

非晶态装甲云: 折跃门允许您在任何有能量覆盖的位置快速折跃单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Warp Gates allow you to rapidly train units at any location where you have power.

非晶态装甲云: 追猎者能够闪现至视野覆盖的任何位置。靠近悬崖的飞行单位可以为追猎者打开高地上的视野。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Stalkers can blink to anyplace that you can see. Use fliers to see up cliffs to gain access to high ground areas.

非晶态装甲云: 虚空辉光舰对目标造成的伤害随持续打击目标时间的增加而提高。为您的虚空辉光舰提供保护，以发挥其最大的效力。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Void Rays do more damage the longer they fight the enemy. Try to protect your Void Rays so they can get to full power.

非晶态装甲云: 巨像能够攀越较矮的悬崖。利用这一能力保护您的巨像或对敌人发动奇袭。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A Colossus can walk up short cliffs. Use this ability to protect your Colossus or to make surprise attacks.

非晶态装甲云: 机械哨兵创造出的力场能够阻拦敌人的行进。使用力场阻止敌人进入您的基地，或阻挡试图靠近的近战单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Sentries can create Force Fields to block movement. Use them to keep enemies out of your base, or to block the approach of melee units.

非晶态装甲云: 机械哨兵创造出的幻像与本体类型单位外观一致。利用幻像迷惑敌人，使其注意力脱离真正的单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Sentries can create Hallucinations that look like your units. Use them to confuse or distract the enemy from your real units.

非晶态装甲云: 高阶圣堂武士释放的灵能风暴能够对敌人造成大量的伤害，融合为执政官前应尽量利用他们所有的能量。
Amorphous Armorcloud: High Templars do a lot of damage with their Psi Storm ability. Try to use up all of their energy before merging them into Archons.

非晶态装甲云: 不朽者特殊的护盾能够将受到的任何攻击所造成的伤害降低至10点。使用不朽者对抗杀伤力强大的单位，如攻城坦克或雷兽。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Immortals have a special shield that reduces attacks to 10 points of damage. Use them against powerful units like Siege Tanks or Ultralisks.

非晶态装甲云: 折跃更多的传送门、星门和机械台可使您在同一时间生产更多的单位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Building extra Gateways, Stargates, and Robotics Facilities enables you to train more troops at a time.

非晶态装甲云: 工蜂在变异为异虫建筑后会被消耗。变异更多的工蜂以保持收入的稳定。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A Drone is used up every time you make a Zerg structure. Be sure to replace those Drones to maintain your income.

非晶态装甲云: 选中一个孵化场，右键点击矿脉，可将其后变异的工蜂派往指定的矿脉进行采集。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Select a Hatchery and right-click on a Mineral Field to cause newly trained Drones to automatically harvest minerals.

非晶态装甲云: 异虫单位在菌毯上的移动速度更快。尽量扩大菌毯的覆盖面积以加速部队的移动。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Zerg units move more quickly on creep. Spread creep wherever you can to speed up your forces.

非晶态装甲云: 虫后能够使孵化场孵化更多的幼虫。为每个孵化场配置一只虫后，并尽可能多地使用该技能。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Queens can cause Hatcheries to spawn additional larva. Build one Queen per Hatchery and use the ability as often as possible.

非晶态装甲云: 潜地后的蟑螂能够以极快的速度恢复生命值。命令受到伤害的蟑螂潜地，恢复后重返战斗。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Roaches regenerate very quickly while burrowed. Burrow your wounded Roaches so they can regenerate and then return to battle.

非晶态装甲云: 利用异龙攻击敌人毫无防备的工作单位。敌人前来反击时，命令异龙飞离战斗，袭扰他处。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Use Mutalisks to attack undefended enemy workers. When the enemy comes to defend, fly away and attack elsewhere.

非晶态装甲云: 如果您需要更多的幼虫来加速单位的生产，则请变异更多的孵化场。
Amorphous Armorcloud: If you need more Larvae to train troops more rapidly, build additional Hatcheries.

非晶态装甲云: 感染者和进化后的蟑螂能够在潜地后移动。利用该技能悄然潜入敌人的领地。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Infestors and upgraded Roaches can move while burrowed. Use this ability to infiltrate enemy territory unobserved.

Amorphous Armorcloud: The races you play in campaign are heavily modified.  Your units and structures in multiplayer are very different than what you have played in campaign.

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can watch replays of your games to learn how to better play the game.

非晶态装甲云: 你可以通过和电脑对抗来提高你的战略水准。
Amorphous Armorcloud: You can practice against the A.I. to improve your strategies.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Try to anticipate what your opponent's next move will be so you can counter their next attack or defense.

非晶态装甲云: 收集尽可能多的资源，并花光它们。数量较多的部队往往能取得最后的胜利。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Gather as many resources as you can and spend them all. The larger army almost always wins.

非晶态装甲云: 使徒是经受过高度训练的战场指挥官。他们使用净化者科技来增强自身的灵能潜力，可以投射自身的阴影然后实现远距离传送。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Highly trained battlefield commanders, adepts utilize Purifier technology to amplify their psionic potential. They are capable of projecting shades of themselves and teleporting across great distances.

非晶态装甲云: 达拉姆的星空锻造厂虽然可以重构来自格拉修斯的各种净化者武器，但是其性能仍然无法媲美凯拉克斯的原型武器。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Daelaam's starforges may be capable of reconstructing the Purifier ordnance from Glacius, but they have yet to match the optimal performance of Karax's original prototypes.

非晶态装甲云: 末日之战结束后，一股怀旧风潮开始在圣堂武士中间盛行。其中一些使徒身穿昔日的正统仪式铠甲，以此彰显心中不灭的骄傲。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Nostalgic sentiment has been growing among the templar after the End War. Some adepts show their pride by wearing formal ceremonial armor from bygone days.

非晶态装甲云: 即便是久经沙场的伊罕利使徒，在求救信号将他们从科普卢星区边缘世界的深度静滞状态中唤醒后，也需要时间来确定方位。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Even battle-hardened Ihan-rii adepts needed time to get their bearings after a distress signal woke them from deep stasis on the fringes of the Koprulu Sector.

非晶态装甲云: 这些智能人格战士都经过了相位技师凯拉克斯的改良，已成为净化者大军的中坚力量。他们的灵敏与出色令人震撼。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Refined by Phase-smith Karax, these AI warriors have become central figures in Purifier armies, impressing all who see them with their agility and refinement.

非晶态装甲云: 尽管达拉姆使徒使用的灵能增幅科技刚被研发不久，但是已经被塔达林逆向工程破解，并且装备给了他们最优秀的战士。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Despite its recent development, the psionic amplification technology used by the Daelaam's adepts has already been reverse engineered by the Tal'darim and equipped on their most promising warriors.

非晶态装甲云: 执政官虽然拥有无可匹敌的灵能力量，但是为之而付出的代价也极其高昂。两名圣堂武士必须自我牺牲才能合为一体，而这充分体现了绝无仅有的大无畏献身精神。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Archons boast overwhelming psionic power, but it comes at a high cost. Two templar must sacrifice themselves for an archon to be formed, making each one an embodiment of unparalleled heroism.

非晶态装甲云: 军械库是围绕几个涡轮机建造的。在研究员们不知疲倦地改良泰伦战争器械的同时，这些设备能够确保建筑一直处于安全的温度范围内。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The armory is built around several turbines. These keep the building within temperature specifications while researchers work tirelessly to improve terran war machinery.

非晶态装甲云: 帝国在精钢装甲技术上取得的最新突破源自于对特战队找到的萨尔纳加构造体进行了分子级解析。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Dominion's latest advances in neosteel armor were developed through the molecular examination of xel'naga constructs recovered by special forces teams.

非晶态装甲云: 有报道称星灵闯入了泰拉多尔九号星的军械库，而这一行为被指控是间谍活动，尽管伊罕利的领导者坚称这些事件只是因为定居者误把这些闪闪发光的建筑当成了人类博物馆。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Reports of protoss wandering into Tyrador IX's armories led to accusations of espionage, though Ihan-rii leadership insisted that these incidents were the result of settlers mistaking the gleaming structures for terran museums.

非晶态装甲云: 即便是科技高度发达的星灵也喜欢在采集高能瓦斯领域不断创新。他们研发了多种吸纳舱来采集这一宝贵资源。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Even the highly advanced protoss appreciate the myriad applications of vespene gas. They developed assimilators to harvest this useful resource.

非晶态装甲云: 塔达林吸纳舱贪婪地从地下抽取着高能瓦斯，引发的地震毁灭了周围的生态系统。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Tal'darim assimilators greedily wrench vespene gas from the ground, triggering earthquakes that decimate surrounding ecosystems.

非晶态装甲云: 伊罕利星灵认为他们自己非常慷慨，他们允许人类继续生存在他们古老而神圣的家园——阿拉基尔，更不用说还让人类在此开采高能瓦斯了。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Ihan-rii protoss consider themselves very generous for allowing terrans to continue living on, let alone mining vespene gas from, their ancient and sacred homeworld, which they call Arakyr.

非晶态装甲云: 在卡斯克围城战中首次观察到的爆虫，是一种由跳虫进化而来的高度不稳定的爆炸性战斗变种。很少有材料能抵御它们爆炸时释放出的强酸烧蚀。
Amorphous Armorcloud: First observed during the Siege of Cask, the baneling is a highly volatile and explosive combat strain evolved from the zergling. Few materials can resist the acidic burst released upon their detonation.

非晶态装甲云: 重造爆虫对工程师们提出了一项特殊的难题，因为他们千辛万苦采集到的酸液囊会不断溶解周遭一切钢化结构。幸运的是，他们最终成功了。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The recreation of the baneling posed a unique problem for engineers, as their carefully harvested acid sacs kept melting through the surrounding plate infrastructure. Eventually, they made it work.

非晶态装甲云: 异虫的巢群里必须要有一个爆虫巢穴来提供爆虫的基因代码。一旦筑巢完毕，战场上的任意一只跳虫就可以被命令在短时间内形成一个肉质的虫蛹，接着它们会以爆虫的形态破壳而出——变异成一种肮脏、臃肿的生物，其背部不停颤动着一团球状的、充满强酸的绿色囊泡。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The zerg hive cluster must have a baneling nest to add the baneling breed's genetic code. Once a nest is in place, any zergling on the field can be commanded to form a fleshy chrysalis for a brief pupation state, and then it will burst forth as a baneling--a foul, bloated creature with bulbous, acid-filled green sacs pulsating on its back.

非晶态装甲云: 仿生机械爆虫巢穴的上半部分是悬空的，其中运用了和泰伦战列巡航舰一样的反重力技术。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The upper half of the Simulant baneling nest is held aloft by the same antigravity technology deployed in terran battlecruisers.

非晶态装甲云: 为了使人类的关键防御工事崩塌，塞伯鲁斯从幕后控制了爆虫巢穴，使其能够在遍布泰拉多尔九号星的洞穴网络中引爆。
Amorphous Armorcloud: To trigger the collapse of key terran fortifications, Cerberus baneling nests have been rigged to detonate in cave networks across Tyrador IX.

非晶态装甲云: 在见识了凯瑞甘虫群中的爆虫后，德哈卡也鼓励自己的族群变异出了类似的变种。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Inspired by the banelings in Kerrigan's Swarm, Dehaka has encouraged the mutation of a similar strain of creatures within his pack.

非晶态装甲云: 替换掉爆虫整个神经系统只是为了让它能够立即爆炸，做这种投资到底效果如何是值得怀疑的。幸运的是，塞伯鲁斯的客户们并不缺钱。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The return on investment for replacing a baneling's entire nervous system, only to have it immediately blow up, is dubious. Luckily, Cerberus's clients have quite a lot of money to spend.

非晶态装甲云: 浑身长满脊刺的利维坦虫巢跳虫至今保留着它们爆虫的酸液囊。即便是彻底的变异也无法改变它们核心精华中的混乱天性。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The spine-like growths of Leviathan Brood zerglings remain present on the acid sacs of their banelings. Even a total metamorphosis is incapable of changing the chaotic nature of their core essence.

非晶态装甲云: 普罗希昂工业集团对女妖的定位是经济实用型战机。专门为前线步兵提供空中支援而建造，它们是执行战术打击的理想飞行器。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Procyon Industries designed banshees to be both economical and effective. Built specifically to provide air support for frontline infantry, they are ideal aircraft for tactical strikes.

非晶态装甲云: 帝国工程师们对女妖的两台VTOL涡扇进行了重大升级，在机体尾部加装新的垂直稳定装置后，战机的稳定性和飞行性能得到了极大改善。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Dominion engineers have made critical upgrades in the banshee's twin VTOL turbofans, enabling superior stability and performance when paired with the new vertical stabilizer in the rear of the craft.

非晶态装甲云: 雇佣兵历来喜欢在他们的作战器械上加装各种装备物件，这些女妖也不例外。据说在这项特殊的设计里甚至装配了推土机的零件。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Mercenaries are infamous for cobbling together pieces of equipment on their machinery, and these banshees are no exception. Rumor has it that some bulldozer parts are involved in this particular design.

非晶态装甲云: 尽管大多数泰拉多尔女妖战机在塞伯鲁斯异虫第一波攻击中就已全军覆没，但其中一名经验丰富的飞行员在首战中成功击毙了三头雷兽。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Though most Tyrador banshees were wiped out in the first wave of the Cerberus zerg attack, one seasoned pilot managed to take down three ultralisks first.

非晶态装甲云: 通过一系列的后门交易，尤摩扬护国军总是能从普罗希昂工业获取一定数量的女妖战机，不过出售方却一直坚称是遭到了盗窃。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Through a series of backdoor deals, the Umojan Protectorate has been able to acquire a limited number of banshees from Procyon Industries, although the company maintains that they were stolen.

非晶态装甲云: 作为泰伦步兵作战人员远离故乡的家，泰伦兵营经过无菌化处理，具有战场机动能力，可以进行快速战场部署。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A home-away-from-home for terran infantry personnel, terran barracks are sterile, mobile, and capable of efficient deployment.

非晶态装甲云: 由于配备了液态氮气冷却系统，特战队兵营散发着诡异的蓝光。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A liquid nitrogen cooling system gives the special forces barracks an eerie blue glow.

非晶态装甲云: 每座泰拉多尔骑士团的兵营中都配有五星级全自动厨房以及全套水疗服务——当然，只对军官开放。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Each Knights of Tyrador barracks features a five-star robotic kitchen and a full-service spa--for officers only, of course.

非晶态装甲云: 战列巡航舰经常在战事升级后的军事行动中作为前线指挥部。它们是配备了重型装甲和强大火力的空中堡垒。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Battlecruisers often serve as mobile command headquarters during extended military campaigns. They are flying fortresses outfitted with heavy armor and imposing weaponry.

非晶态装甲云: 经过长期研发后，最新升级的莫莱级战列巡航舰被批准专由帝国特战队使用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: After a lengthy research and development process, the newly upgraded Moirai class battlecruisers were approved for exclusive use by Dominion Special Forces.

非晶态装甲云: 这些火力凶猛的舰船全部按照雇佣兵的口味进行了改装。只可惜，改装它们的人几乎没有一个能活到欣赏他们杰作完成的一天。
Amorphous Armorcloud: These ferocious vessels have been modified to suit the mercenaries' preferences. However, few onlookers live long enough to admire their handiwork.

非晶态装甲云: “母巢之战”时期的战列巡航舰其指挥室甲板的位置更隐蔽、外形也更低调。遭遇异虫伏击时，左舷和右舷两侧的观景甲板可以提供最大化的能见度。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The command decks of Brood War-era battlecruisers had a lower profile, with port and starboard viewdecks to ensure maximum visibility in the event of a zerg ambush.

非晶态装甲云: 遭到塞伯鲁斯异虫攻击后，泰拉多尔骑士团派遣了一艘贝希摩斯级战列巡航舰向停靠在静地轨道的陨石战舰发出援救请求。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Assailed by Cerberus zerg, the Knights of Tyrador dispatched a Behemoth-class battlecruiser to request aid from the stone ships waiting in silent orbit.

非晶态装甲云: 尤摩扬战列巡航舰配备了重新设计的精钢板甲，同时改进了大和炮，这使得它们在战斗中的表现尤为突出。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Umojan battlecruisers feature redesigned neosteel plating, as well as refinements to the Yamato cannons that make them particularly distinctive in battles.

非晶态装甲云: 为统治天空进化而来的巢虫领主是非常可怕的生物，它们会对敌方部队抛射大量毁灭性的巢虫。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Evolved to rule the skies, the brood lords are terrifying creatures that hurl their destructive broodlings at enemy forces.

非晶态装甲云: 巢虫领主原型机超出了所有设计指标。在其即将完成之际，仿生工程团队的科学家们得到了一次庆功性质的集体休假。奇怪的是，他们再也没有回来……
Amorphous Armorcloud: Upon completing the brood lord prototype which exceeded all standards, the team of Project Simulant scientists were sent on leave for a celebratory vacation. Strangely, they never returned...

非晶态装甲云: 原始异虫族群吸收了少量的巢虫领主，由此诞生了一种完全不同的生物，拥有不同寻常的利爪。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A small number of brood lords have been integrated into primal zerg packs, resulting in a strikingly different creature most notable for its unusual claws.

非晶态装甲云: 每一只从塞伯鲁斯巢虫领主身体里派出的巢虫，都可以单独由一名指挥官在电脑控制面板上安全地进行操控，避免了亲自上阵的危险。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Each broodling dispatched from the Cerberus brood lord can be controlled individually by a commander safe at a computer console, far away from the actual battle.

非晶态装甲云: 尽管巢虫领主加入虫群的时间比较晚，但是它们仍然具备利维坦虫巢最显著的基因特质——很可能是进化大师阿巴瑟早期的精华实验物。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Despite their late introduction into the Swarm, many brood lords still bear the Leviathan Brood's signature genetic traits--likely a sign of early essence experimentation by the evolution master, Abathur.

非晶态装甲云: 在感染一颗绝大部分地表都是海洋的星球时，一些巢虫领主习惯了在水里生存，并进化出了潜入海沟吞食猎物的能力。
Amorphous Armorcloud: While infesting a planet with exceptionally large seas, some brood lords took to the water and evolved the ability to dive deep into the trenches while devouring their prey.

非晶态装甲云: 由于它普遍存在而且缺乏便利设施，泰伦步兵通常把地堡叫做“战场活棺材”。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Due to its ubiquity and lack of amenities, terran infantry commonly refer to bunkers as "battlefield coffins."

非晶态装甲云: 次世代的帝国地堡可以承受住一只雷兽的全部重量，但陆战队员们最开心的其实是终于有椅子可以坐了。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The next-generation Dominion bunker can withstand the full weight of an ultralisk, but what most marines are excited about is the fact that it comes with chairs.

非晶态装甲云: 泰拉多尔的极冷地堡能提供舒适的侦察体验，哪怕是在酷热难耐的热带度假区域。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Tyrador's supercooled bunkers make for comfortable reconnaissance, even in sweltering tropical vacation zones.

非晶态装甲云: 这些气势磅礴的大型战舰是圣堂武士心中的希望，更是敌人眼里的绝望。配备了高速拦截机的它们是战场上的一股可怕力量。
Amorphous Armorcloud: These magnificent capital ships are known to inspire hope in the hearts of the templar--or fear in their enemies. Armed with swift interceptors, they are a formidable force on the battlefield.

非晶态装甲云: 为了更好地还原万世之战之后的古代航母，少数航母使用了古代技术进行了重建。它们现今主要用于外交访问。
Amorphous Armorcloud: A small number of carriers have been rebuilt using ancient techniques to better resemble their counterparts from the period after the Aeon of Strife. They are primarily used for diplomatic visits.

非晶态装甲云: 这种由伊罕利星灵研发的可变形陨石不仅重量很轻、抗击性好，而且化学惰性很强，是制造大型深空舰船的完美材料。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The animated stone developed by the Ihan-rii protoss is light, durable, and chemically inert, making it the perfect material for massive deep-space ships.

非晶态装甲云: 净化者航母是一种流水线产品，它将自动化与无人机技术完美的结合了起来。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The Purifier carrier is a streamlined creation that perfectly combines automation expertise with the deadliest of drone weapons.

非晶态装甲云: 仿照传奇旗舰“星梭号”打造的航母继续在星灵势力的某些角落里生产着，以此纪念塔萨达尔及其所做出的牺牲。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Carriers modeled after legendary flagship Gantrithor continue to be built in certain corners of Protoss space, to honor Tassadar and the sacrifice he made.

非晶态装甲云: 塔达林造船厂极其擅长将卡莱工程科技改造成杀人利器。作为死亡舰队主力的航母就是彻头彻尾的改装成品。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Tal'darim shipwrights excel at repurposing khalai engineering for bloodshed. The carriers that make up the majority of the death fleet are warships through and through.

非晶态装甲云: 埃蒙腐化了大部分的黄金舰队，并将其收为己用。这些被控制的星灵由于受到虚空能量的影响，呈现出一种不同的外貌，连他们的舰船也受到了相同的影响。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Amon corrupted a large portion of the Golden Armada, using their warriors as his own. These possessed protoss took on a different appearance due to the Void energy, and their ships were likewise changed.

非晶态装甲云: 巨像是星灵设计的第一种专注于毁灭的机器人。它们昭示了一段血腥的历史，也用实力确保了和平的未来。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Colossi were the first protoss robots designed solely for destruction. They are both a symbol of a bloody history and a necessary weapon to secure a peaceful future.

非晶态装甲云: 在卡拉提仲裁事件后，巨像被认为太过危险而被禁止使用。于是净化者项目的巨像就成了圣堂武士战士们中的传奇。它们是究极的净化机械。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Deemed too dangerous for use after the Kalath Intercession, the Purifier program's colossi are legendary among the Templar's warriors. These are the ultimate purification machines.

非晶态装甲云: 一批经历了末日之战的巨像，在经过精挑细选后，被使用最顶级的材料重新改造成了传统样式。如今的它们成为了古代星灵机器人技术的集大成者。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Selected colossi that saw combat in the End War have been remodeled in a traditionalist style using the finest materials available. They now resemble the grandest of ancient protoss robotics.

非晶态装甲云: 伊罕利巨像的大量陨石组件，都是经由重新调校后的萨尔那加动能机所散发出的虚空能量，将它们悬浮托举并聚拢在一起。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The many stone components of the Ihan-rii colossus are levitated and held together by void energies emanated from repurposed xel'naga dynamos.

非晶态装甲云: 净化者在工程学上的最新成果催生出了一种线条流畅、工艺精细的加强版巨像，简直就是一台战争机器艺术品。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The latest in Purifier engineering has yielded a sleek, subtly enhanced colossus that is nonetheless a brutal war machine.

非晶态装甲云: 圣物大战早已结束，被掩埋和遗忘在星区各处旧战场上的巨像，经常被追求更强火力的塔达林晋升者挖掘出来，重新投入使用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Relics of wars long over, colossi that lay buried and forgotten across the sector are often unearthed and reactivated by Tal'darim ascendants who seek superior firepower.

非晶态装甲云: 低阶的晋升者们经常挑战对方去关闭并控制一台激活的巨像。如果成功，那么塔达林就多了一个强大的战争机器；如果失败，则少了一个升格对手。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Lower ranking ascendants often dare each other to disable and commandeer an active colossus. If one succeeds, the Tal'darim gain a powerful war machine. If not, a rival ascendant has been eliminated.

非晶态装甲云: 既能移动部署而且功能实用的指挥中心是资源处理中心，它们可以迁移到任何晶体矿或高能瓦斯丰富的地点。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Mobile and practical, command centers are resource processors that can relocate to wherever minerals or vespene gas are plentiful.

非晶态装甲云: 加固后的反推器着陆架能让这种指挥中心即便是在最严酷的环境中也能找到安全的落脚点。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Reinforced repulsor landing claws help this command center find solid footing in even the harshest environments.

非晶态装甲云: 早期迭代版本的指挥中心有一个可扩展的接口，以便与外部附件连接。后来为了提高安全性，内部操作台取代了这种接口。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Previous iterations of the command center had an extensible interface in order to connect with external add-ons. These were later replaced with internal bays for increased security.

非晶态装甲云: 在伊罕利星灵抵达后，泰拉多尔的指挥中心接待了来自科普卢星区各处的外交使节。每名使节都想要拉拢这些新来的人，来达成自己的政治目的。
Amorphous Armorcloud: After the arrival of the Ihan-rii protoss, Tyrador's command centers played host to diplomatic envoys from around the Koprulu Sector, each intent on recruiting the newcomers to their own specific political agenda.

非晶态装甲云: 靠生物制造出的电磁场而漂浮起来的腐化者，可以喷洒具有超强腐蚀性的强酸液体，即便是最牢固的建造材料也无法抵御侵蚀。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Held aloft by a biologically produced electromagnetic field, corruptors can spray a stream of caustic acid that eats through even the most durable of construction materials.

非晶态装甲云: 与孵生孢子不同，这些机械腐化者拥有自我修复能力的纳米机器人，它们被编程后可以产生与孢子相同的功能，就这一点足以让人不安了。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Rather than spores, these mechanical corruptors possess self-replicating nanites that have been programmed to perform the same function, disturbingly enough.

非晶态装甲云: 最早的腐化者具有虫群和原始异虫两种特征。后者进化出了更粗的利爪和更厚的甲壳，以更好地辅助其严格的进食过程。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The original corruptors have the distinction of being adapted by both the Swarm and the primal zerg. The latter have adapted thicker claws and carapaces to assist with their rigorous feeding process.

非晶态装甲云: 阿克图尔斯·蒙斯克倒台后，被迫转入地下的“塞伯鲁斯工程”逐步为他们的神经重新编程计划确立了新的方向，对象不再是泰伦士兵而是异虫。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Driven underground after the fall of Arcturus Mengsk, the Cerberus Program evolved their neural reprogramming initiative, targeting zerg instead of terran soldiers.

非晶态装甲云: 虽然坚硬的脊刺和蹼状特征经常透露出它们的水栖背景，但是利维坦虫巢的腐化者们还是成功适应了在超重环境中生存。
Amorphous Armorcloud: While hardened spines and webbed features often suggest an aquatic background, the Leviathan Brood's corruptors adapted them to survive in high gravity environments.

非晶态装甲云: 这些由叛变仿生机械虫后制造的菌毯肿瘤，必定藏有复杂的纳米科技秘辛，但是想做进一步调查的尝试总会被肿瘤结构受损即自爆的防御机制所破坏。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Sophisticated nanotechnology must lie at the heart of creep tumors created by rogue Simulant queens, though further investigation has been stymied by the tumors' tendency to detonate when cut open.

非晶态装甲云: 星灵被外界所熟知的一点是，他们会给倒下的战士们加装人造躯体，赋予他们第二次生命，以重获战斗的荣光。控制芯核在研发此项科技的过程中起到了关键性的作用。
Amorphous Armorcloud: The protoss are known to pair elite fallen warriors with artificial bodies, granting them a second life in glorious combat. The cybernetics core plays a large role in developing this technology.

非晶态装甲云: 所有控制芯核都具备将生物体植入精密器械的能力，但是塔达林的控制芯核有一点不同，那就是整个过程会非常痛苦。
Amorphous Armorcloud: All cybernetics cores possess the ability to bind biological beings to elaborate machinery; in Tal'darim cybernetics cores, the main difference is that the process is unimaginably painful.

非晶态装甲云: 人类在侦查伊罕利定居点的过程中，发现了一种和当代星灵控制芯核非常类似的构造体，不过这种伊罕利构造体散发出的能量完全不同。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Terran recon of Ihan-rii settlements yielded footage of a structure resembling the contemporary protoss cybernetics core, though the energies produced by the Ihan-rii version were wildly different.

非晶态装甲云: 原本是设计成全自动控制的高机动性战车，后来还是重新设计为有人驾驶。毕竟，人类驾驶员具有高度的不可预知性。
Amorphous Armorcloud: Originally intended to be fully automated, this mobile assault vehicle was redesigned to accommodate a pilot. After all, nothing can match the unpredictability of a human driver.
